channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nine Taxis Burnt in Nyanga Amid Rising Taxi Feud Tensions
item.description: Early on Friday morning, nine taxis were set alight at the Nyanga taxi rank in Cape Town, reigniting fears of violent taxi feuds in the area. This incident comes roughly a month after a deadly shootin...

item.title: Australian political response to US-Iran conflict discussed on Back to Back Barries podcast
item.description: One week after the initiation of US military strikes on Iran, the Back to Back Barries podcast, hosted by Barrie Cassidy and Tony Barry, analyses the rapid response of Prime Minister Anthony Albanese ...

item.title: Eight Senior Police Officers Retire, Review Terms of Exit, May Take Legal Action
item.description: On Friday, eight top officers of the Nigeria Police Force, including former Force Public Relations Officer Frank Mba, officially retired. Others involved na Sadiq Idris Abubakar, Bzigu Yakubu Kwazi we...

item.title: Andhra Pradesh authorities coordinate evacuation of stranded citizens due to Israel-Iran conflict
item.description: As the conflict between Israel and Iran intensifies, the Andhra Pradesh government has taken proactive measures to evacuate nearly 200 citizens from the region affected by the ongoing hostilities. The...

item.title: U.S. Justice Department Releases Previously Withheld Epstein Files Including Uncorroborated Allegation Against Trump
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice has released previously withheld documents related to Jeffrey Epstein, including allegations made against former President Donald Trump. The files, which were mistakenly...

item.title: Global Implications of the Iran Conflict: Strategic Alignments and Risks
item.description: The article analyzes the international dimensions of the ongoing conflict involving Iran, highlighting its potential to disrupt global energy supplies and escalate tensions in Europe. It examines the ...

item.title: Tunisian film depicts the human impact of Israel’s military actions
item.description: The Voice of Hind Rajab, a Tunisian film directed by Kaouther Ben Hania, offers a powerful and intimate portrayal of the human cost of Israel’s military operations. Screening at the Joburg Film Festiv...

item.title: NUJ Rejects Appointment Of Unqualified Persons Into Media Positions In Rivers State
item.description: The Nigeria Union of Journalists (NUJ) Rivers State Council don express serious wahala over how non-journalists and people wey no get proper qualification dey appointed into media-related government p...

item.title: Authorities arrest suspect linked to Parañaque condominium shooting
item.description: Authorities have successfully apprehended the individual suspected of carrying out the shooting incident at a condominium in Parañaque. The suspect was taken into custody following an investigation by...

item.title: Healy falls early in farewell Test as Australia manage steady reply in Perth
item.description: Retiring Australian captain Alyssa Healy struggled with the pink ball and was dismissed cheaply for 13 in her farewell Test against India in Perth. Australia ended day one on 3-96, trailing India’s fi...

item.title: Usizolwethu School Gets Fully Equipped Computer Lab to Support Special Needs Learners
item.description: Pupils at Usizolwethu Special Needs School in Daveyton, Benoni, recently received a major boost in their learning journey with the opening of a fully equipped computer lab, donated by Vodacom. The lab...

item.title: ADC Criticises Tinubu Administration Over Ambassadorial Appointment Process
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don sharply criticize President Bola Tinubu government over the recent ambassadorial postings, calling am diplomatic mistake. According to the party, the governme...

item.title: The historical ties between Ireland and Jamaica reflected in accents and migration
item.description: Irish politician Thomas Gould has gained attention in Jamaica after a video of him speaking in the Irish parliament highlighted the unexpected similarities between his Cork accent and Jamaican speech ...

item.title: Free Online Russian Language Course Now Open for Kenyans
item.description: The Russian embassy in Nairobi has rolled out a free online Russian language course for Kenyans, aimed at helping them master the A1 language level for everyday communication. The initiative is a coll...

item.title: Patients Experience Extended Waits on Stretchers Due to Overflow at Corner Brook Hospital
item.description: Patients at the Western Memorial Regional Hospital in Corner Brook, Newfoundland and Labrador, have reported extended stays on overflow stretchers due to a shortage of regular hospital beds. Jaymee Mi...

item.title: UNIZIK Awards Emeka Ezekwe for Contributions to Education and AI Development
item.description: The Nnamdi Azikiwe University (UNIZIK), Awka, don confer Digital Academic Promoter Award on High Chief (Dr.) Emeka Ezekwe, the MD and CEO of Arrowconn Group, to recognise him for him philanthropic ges...

item.title: Hidden Thunderstorms Are the Main Source of Saharan Dust
item.description: Saharan dust that reaches Europe and the UK originates largely from previously overlooked thunderstorms high above the desert rather than the familiar wind systems traditionally thought to transport i...

item.title: Incident in Andhra Pradesh School Where Class 10 Student Assaulted Teacher
item.description: In Andhra Pradesh, an alarming incident occurred in a school where a Class 10 student physically assaulted a teacher. The event, captured on video, quickly circulated on social media, drawing widespre...

item.title: Polisi Tanzania prepare seriously for CRDB Cup match against Yanga at KMC Stadium
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Polisi Tanzania football team have ramped up their preparations ahead of the CRDB Cup clash against defending champions Young Africans (Yanga) scheduled at KMC Stadium this weekend. Ac...

item.title: Indian Congress criticises government over US approval for Russian oil imports
item.description: The Indian National Congress has criticised Prime Minister Narendra Modi's BJP government after the United States temporarily allowed the sale of Russian oil stranded at sea to India. Congress claims ...
